penalties.description: Task not completed - objects remain on the right side and have not been transferred back to the original left side.

reasoning: The video shows clear outbound transfers of objects from left to right pegs, but the task is incomplete. All six objects are successfully transferred to the right side by the end of the video sequence, but the required return transfers back to the original left side are not performed. Per FLS scoring rules, incomplete tasks receive a score of zero regardless of partial completion.
